uiDefinition.description: The API Key for this api

properties.description: Spur Context API provides hosted high-performance IP enrichment lookups of the highest-fidelity IP intelligence available. With pre-built integrations into the most common threat analysis platforms and services, Spur ensures that security teams can instantly leverage data to protect their environments from the latest evasion and obfuscation methods, such as VPNs, residential proxies, and bot automation.

info.title: Spur Context API
info.description: Spur Context API provides IP intelligence including proxy detection, infrastructure details, risks, services and metadata.

get.description: Returns intelligence and risk context for a given IP address.
Returns metadata information for a provider or service tag.
Retrieves the status of your API token, the number of queries remaining for the billing period, and service tier.

ip.name: ip
ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address associated with the connection

dt.name: dt
dt.description: A datetime in the format YYYYmmdd. This argument is only valid for subscriptions with access to historical records.

tag.name: tag
tag.description: The Tag Metadata Object includes analysis, statistics, and metrics for a service tag.

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: IPv4 address associated with the connection.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: The organization currently assigned to use the specific IP address, such as a customer, hosting provider, or service operator.

risks.title: Risk Indicators
risks.description: List of identified risk factors or behaviors.

services.title: Services
services.description: List of services or protocols in use.

as.title: Autonomous System Information
as.description: Spur IP GeoBGP autonomous system information.

organization.description: The organization currently assigned to use the specific IP address, such as a customer, hosting provider, or service operator.
organization.title: ASN Organization

location.title: Location Information
location.description: Spur IP Geo location information of the IP.

client.title: Client Information
client.description: Descriptive data about the connecting client.

tunnels.title: Tunnel Information
tunnels.description: Descriptive data about the connecting client.

tag.title: Tag Identifier
tag.description: Unique identifier or tag for this service or entity.

name.title: Service Name
name.description: Human-readable name of the service or entity.

website.title: Website URL
website.description: Primary website or homepage for the service.

categories.title: Service Categories
categories.description: Product categories for bandwidth reselling and routing.

platforms.title: Supported Platforms
platforms.description: Operating systems and environments supported by this service.

protocols.title: Supported Protocols
protocols.description: Protocols or services used for network traffic.

targetingTypes.title: Targeting Types
targetingTypes.description: Possible granularities for configuring a service exit or route.

description.title: Service Description
description.description: A free-text description of the service or entity.

allowsCrypto.title: Supports Crypto Payments
allowsCrypto.description: Whether the service supports or facilitates crypto-based payments or platforms.

allowsFreeAccess.description: Whether the service is available for free usage.
allowsFreeAccess.title: Allows Free Access

allowsMultihop.title: Supports Multihop
allowsMultihop.description: Whether the service offers multi-hop or chaining functionalities.

allowsTorrents.title: Allows Torrents
allowsTorrents.description: Whether the service permits torrent or P2P file-sharing traffic.

allowsWhiteLabel.title: Supports White Label
allowsWhiteLabel.description: Indicates whether white-label or rebranded versions of the service exist.

isAnonymous.title: Anonymous Service
isAnonymous.description: Whether the service or infrastructure primarily aims to anonymize user traffic.

isCallbackProxy.title: Callback Proxy Enabled
isCallbackProxy.description: Whether the service includes callback or reverse-proxy functionalities.

isEnterprise.title: Enterprise Oriented
isEnterprise.description: Whether the service or platform is oriented toward enterprise usage.

isNoLog.title: No Logging Policy
isNoLog.description: Whether the service claims a \'no logging\' policy.

isInactive.title: Service Inactive
isInactive.description: Whether the service is currently inactive or defunct.
